title: License periods
doc_html:
§658.  License periods

The licenses herein provided for shall be issued annually and shall be effective from July 1st of each calendar year through June 30th of the next calendar year.  

Added by Acts 1958, No. 455, §8.
doc_text:
§658.  License periods
The licenses herein provided for shall be issued annually and shall be effective from July 1st of each calendar year through June 30th of the next calendar year.
Added by Acts 1958, No. 455, §8.
